notes: Complete projection sheet redesign. Top: 3 Account Balance rows (Savings, Salary, CC; live for current month, start-of-month otherwise). Inflows now include Redemptions row. Surplus & Allocation simplified to 4 rows: MF SIP, RD, Other one-time investments (grouped), Planned to Savings (auto = surplus − allocated). Transfers section removed. Running Balances has only investment rows (no compounded-monthly tag). New bottom Cash Balance row shows projected end-of-month savings (May = May1 + Planned target; future = previous EOM + planned).
